message:
test(proptest): add 15 property-based tests for bounded buffer cap enforcement [ft-3kxe.6]

Comprehensive proptest regression suite validating memory leak hardening
caps across all bounded data structures in frankenterm-core:

- EventDeduplicator: capacity enforcement, duplicate detection after
  eviction, deterministic verdicts (3 tests)
- NotificationCooldown: capacity enforcement under random keys (1 test)
- RateLimitTracker: pane cap (256), event-per-pane cap (64), LRU
  preservation of recent entries (3 tests)
- RingBuffer: capacity bound, eviction tracking accuracy, insertion
  order preservation (3 tests)
- SPSC channel: no-duplication/no-corruption under random payloads (1 test)
- DetectionContext: seen-key cap at MAX_SEEN_KEYS (1000) (1 test)
- ScrollbackEvictor: deterministic planning, tier priority ordering (2 tests)
- Cross-cutting: all caps hold under adversarial interleaved churn (1 test)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
